message.content:
@startuml
skinparam sequenceMessageAlign center
title Hive Upgrade Process Flowchart

actor Admin
participant "Sqoop" as Sqoop #lightblue
database "Metastore DB" as MetastoreDB #lightgray
rectangle HDFS { participant "Hive SQL\n(Hadoop Distributed File System)" as HiveSQL } 
entity "Hive Table Storage Layer Interface Object Model View Controller Pattern Based Architecture Design And Implementation Using Java Programming Language With Spring Framework For Web Application Development In Eclipse IDE On Windows Operating System Environment." As HTSLOMVCPBAIJPLWSFWADIEOWOSE  
control Ambari 

Admin ->> Sqoop : Run \"Collect Metadata\"\nExtracts from \nsaves to 
note right of SQOOP: This process should be run several days BEFORE actual upgrade reduce downtime.\nAnd just before AFTER users cleared ensure tables modified after runs.
SQOO P->HTSL O M V C PB A I J PL WS F W AD IE OW OS E:TUNE COMPACT OR estimated compaction needs\Run script break apart needed..


@enduml
